The third chart is that of Mary, Queen of Scots. All the
planets are in the western hemisphere, indicating that she
was a product of the times and that she tried to exploit the
situation in England. The stage was set ready for her and she
played the role allotted. Saturn here is on the hemisphere
line. Saturn indicates a way of acting in which the individual
accepts experience and attempts to adjust himself or herself to
practical facts. Havelock Ellis has all his planets between the
tenth and the fourth, with Saturn in the seventh very near
the hemisphere line. Thus there is a world of contrast between
these two.
